framework.name: Meatspace Layer for AI
framework.description: The concept that AI agents need a physical-world execution layer since they can't perform embodied tasks. Humans become the 'hands' for digital agents. Reveals fundamental constraint: agents are digital-native but world is physical.
framework.raw_quote: it proudly bills itself as 'the meatspace layer for AI'

source.title: Rent-a-Human wants AI Agents to hire you | Mashable
